recommendation: Replace with the real Oviond OpenAPI JSON or remove/hide the endpoint before launch.

evidence: Oviond is a white-label digital marketing reporting platform built for agencies. Connect your clients' marketing accounts — Google Ads, Facebook, and 30+ other platforms — and build professional dashboards and reports th
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Click your current avatar image (or the initials placeholder) and select an image file from your computer. Oviond accepts JPG and PNG files. Your avatar is visible to other team members inside the platform.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Your account settings let you control everything personal to your login — your display name, language, avatar, and email address — as well as account-level details that apply across your entire Oviond workspace. You can  | Your profile controls how you appear inside Oviond and, where applicable, in client-facing communications sent from your account. | Click **Save**. Oviond may send a verification email to your new address to confirm the change.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: The usage panel displays the following metrics alongside your plan's limits: | If you're approaching a limit, you can upgrade your plan from **Billing** in the sidebar. See [Plans and billing](/billing/plans) for details on what each plan includes.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: > See what your agency has used against your plan's limits.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: "description": "Optional starting avatar URL; defaults to a placeholder the user can replace."
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.
Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: If you need more clients or seats than any listed plan offers, contact Oviond support to ask about enterprise options.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Oviond uses Stripe to handle all subscription billing. You can manage your plan, payment method, and invoices directly from your account settings or through the Stripe customer portal. | Go to **Settings → Billing** and click **Manage Billing**. This opens the Stripe customer portal in a new tab, where you can:
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: * `GET /v1/white-label/domains/:id/status` — check DNS verification via Vercel | ### Uploads, folders, and S3-backed storage | Upload images and assets, organize them into folders, and reference them directly from widgets. Deletes are soft — files stay in S3 for recovery.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Folders are purely organizational — they don't affect permissions, billing, or reports. A single client can be assigned to multiple folders if needed.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Deleting a domain stops it from serving reports and removes it from Vercel on Oviond's side. Shared links that used the custom domain will fall back to `app.oviond.com`.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.
Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Oviond re-queries DNS and Vercel (the SSL provider) and updates the status immediately. | * **Cloudflare / Vercel DNS** — under 1 minute
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.
Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: By default Oviond sends automation emails via our managed provider (Resend). If your agency needs every email to pass through its own SMTP server — for audit, deliverability isolation, or IP warming — configure SMTP unde
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Deleted media items are **soft-deleted** — the S3 file stays in place and the row is retained until the retention window expires. Widgets that reference a deleted item will show a broken image until the item is restored
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Widgets that referenced the deleted item show a broken-image placeholder with a **Missing Media** badge. Options:
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Deleting a single media item removes it from the active library and moves it to the [Archive](/archive/view). The underlying S3 file is retained for the restore window — nothing is permanently destroyed at this step. | Archived media items older than the retention window (90 days by default) are **permanently purged**, including the S3 file. Restore before then if you want to keep it.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Renaming a media item updates its display name only. The underlying S3 file keeps the same URL — widgets referencing the item don't need to be re-wired. | * The file's URL (the S3 key is immutable).
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: The **Media library** is where every image, logo, icon, and file referenced from widgets, reports, and share pages lives. Uploads go straight to S3-backed storage — Oviond generates a pre-signed URL, the file uploads dir
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: *"What is your company's website?"* — your agency's URL. If you don't include `http://` or `https://`, Oviond adds `https://` automatically. Shown on the accounts row and used for the default screenshot on your own compa
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Open the copy's settings to give it a new name and, if needed, assign it to a different client.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: | **Oviond Library** | Neutral starter themes maintained by Oviond. |
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: Click **Send invitation**. The invitee receives an email with a link to accept the invitation and set up their login. The invitation link expires after a set period — if they don't accept in time, you can resend it from  | ## Resend an invitation | If a pending team member hasn't accepted their invitation, you can resend it.
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: > Irreversible. Cancels the active Stripe subscription, deletes all data across every table for this account, removes all team members from the users table, purges all S3 media files, and deletes all Supabase Auth users. | users table, purges all S3 media files, and deletes all Supabase Auth
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

evidence: > Get the accounts row for the current account | description: Get the accounts row for the current account
recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.

recommendation: Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.
Rewrite for customer-facing clarity; remove internal implementation details and uncertain wording.
